name: booking_confirmation
subject: Your Booking is Confirmed — {{ doc.booking_title }}
response:
Dear {{ frappe.db.get_value('Event Customer', doc.customer, 'full_name') }},

Your booking {{ doc.booking_title }} has been confirmed.

Booking ID:{{ doc.name }}
Vendor:{{ doc.vendor }}
Event Date:{{ doc.event_date }}
Total Amount:₹{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(doc.total_amount) }}
Advance Due:₹{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(doc.advance_amount) }}

Thank you for choosing EventSphere!

name: booking_request
subject: New Booking Request — {{ doc.event_date }}
response:
You have a new booking request.

Booking: {{ doc.name }}

Event Date: {{ doc.event_date }}

Please login to respond.

name: payment_receipt
subject: Payment of ₹{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(doc.amount) }} Received
response:
Dear Customer,

We have received your payment of ₹{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(doc.amount) }}.

Payment ID: {{ doc.name }}
Booking: {{ doc.booking }}
Mode: {{ doc.payment_mode }}
Transaction ID: {{ doc.transaction_id or 'N/A' }}

name: event_reminder_customer
subject: Reminder: Your event is in 3 days!
response:
Dear Customer,

This is a reminder that your event {{ booking_title }} is in 3 days.

Event Date: {{ event_date }}
Vendor: {{ vendor }}

View Booking

name: event_reminder_vendor
subject: Upcoming Event Reminder
response:
Dear Vendor,

This is a reminder that you have an upcoming event.

Booking: {{ doc.booking_title }}
Event Date: {{ doc.event_date }}
Customer: {{ doc.customer }}

name: vendor_approved
subject: Your Vendor Profile is Now Active!
response:
Congratulations {{ doc.contact_person }}!

Your profile {{ doc.vendor_name }} has been approved and is now live on EventSphere.

name: cancellation_notice
subject: Booking Cancelled — {{ doc.booking_title }}
response:
Booking {{ doc.booking_title }} has been cancelled.

Booking ID: {{ doc.name }}

If you believe this is an error, please contact support.
